references.text: Bennett, A. 1914. The Potamogetons of the Philippine islands. Philippine Journal of Science, C. Botany 9: 339-344
Hartog, C den & G Wiegleb. 2002. Potamogetonaceae, Zosteraceae, and Cymodoceaceae. Flora Malesiana, Series 1 16: 167-216
Hartog, C den. 1970. The Sea Grasses of the World. Verhandelingen der Koninklijke Nederlandsche Akademie van Wetenschappen 2, 59: 275 pp.

species.citation: A.Benn. , J. Bot. 42 (1904) 72 ; Den Hartog & Wiegleb, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 16 (2002) 182; Type: from China (lecto). = Potamogeton perversus A.Benn. , PJS 9c (1914) 343; Type: from Asia. ≠ Potamogeton polygonifolius auct. non Pourr. ; A.Benn., PJS 9 c (1914) 344. ≠ Potamogeton indicus auct. non Roxb. ; A.Benn., PJS 9 c (1914) 340.
species.distribution: Bhutan, China, Japan, Java, Korea, Lesser Sunda Isls, Mongolia, Myanmar, Nepal, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Russia, Ryukyu Isls, Singapore, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Tibet, Vietnam. LUZON: Benguet, Ifugao.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 127 ; Den Hartog & Wiegleb, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 16 (2002) 184; Type: from Europe (lecto). ≠ Potamogeton angustifolius auct. non Bercht. & C.Presl ; A.Benn., PJS 9 c (1914) 340.
species.distribution: Afghanistan, Africa, China, Eurasia, India, Japan, Madagascar, Myanmar, Nepal, Pakistan, Philippines, Tibet. LUZON.

species.citation: A.Benn. , J. Bot. 42 (1904) 74 ; Bennett, PJS 9c (1914) 342; Mendoza & Del Rosario, Philipp. Aquat. Flow. PI. Ferns (1967) 41; Den Hartog & Wiegleb, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 16 (2002) 184; Type: from Russia.
species.distribution: China, India, Indochina, Japan, Korea, Mongolia, Myanmar, Philippines, Russia, Sumatra, Taiwan. MINDANAO.

species.citation: Weber , Suppl. Fl. Holsat. (1787) 5 ; Den Hartog & Wiegleb, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 16 (2002) 190; Type: from Germany.
species.distribution: Europe, Japan, N America, Philippines, Russia. MINDANAO.

species.citation: Poir. , Encycl. (Lamarck) Suppl. 4 (1816) 55, as 'nodosum' ; Den Hartog & Wiegleb, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 16 (2002) 185; Type: from Canary Islands. = Potamogeton malaianus Miq. , Ill. Fl. Archip. Ind. 1 (1870) 46, as 'malaina'; Type: from Indonesia. ≠ Potamogeton tepperi auct. non A.Benn. ; A.Benn., PJS 9 c (1914) Bot. 340; Mendoza & Del Rosario, Philipp. Aquat. Flow. Pl. Ferns (1967) 42.
species.distribution: Afghanistan, Africa, America, Andaman Isls, Australia, Bangladesh, Cambodia, China, Europe, Indian Ocean, Lesser Sunda Isls, Madagascar, Myanmar, Nepal, New Caledonia, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Pakistan, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam, W Asia. LUZON: Rizal.

species.citation: A.Benn. , PJS 9c (1914) 342 ; Den Hartog & Wiegleb, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 16 (2002) 185; Mendoza & Del Rosario, Philipp. Aquat. Flow. Pl. Ferns (1967) 41; Type: Clemens 2548, Mindanao.
species.notes: Only known from type locality. Potamogeton maackianus x Potamogeton wrightii.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 127 ; Bennett, PJS 9c (1914) 342; Mendoza & Del Rosario, Philipp. Aquat. Flow. Pl. Ferns (1967) 42; Den Hartog & Wiegleb, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 16 (2002) 190; Type: from Europe.
species.distribution: Afghanistan, Africa, America, China, Eurasia, India, Japan, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Pakistan, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Taiwan, Tibet. LUZON.

species.citation: Morong , Bull. Torrey Bot. Club 13 (1886) 158 ; Den Hartog & Wiegleb, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 16 (2002) 191; Type: from Japan. = Potamogeton mucronatus C.Presl , Abh. Königl. Böhm. Ges. Wiss., 5th Ser. 6 (1851) 605, nom. illeg., non Schrad. ex Sond.; Type: Cuming 1381, Luzon. ≠ Potamogeton malainus auct. non Miq. ; A.Benn., J. Bot. 42 (1904) 73, as 'malianus'; PJS 9 c (1914) 341, as 'malaina'; Mendoza & Del Rosario, Philipp. Aquat. Flow. Pl. Ferns (1967) 41, as 'malainus'; Merr., Fl. Manila (1968) 67, as 'malainus'.
species.distribution: Bangladesh, Borneo, C Asia, China, India, Japan, ?Java, Korea, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Guinea, Pacific Ocean, Pakistan, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. JOLO (photos), LUZON: Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, Laguna, Nueva Ecija, Rizal, MINDANAO: Lanao del Sur, MINDORO, PALAWAN, SAMAR.

species.citation: (L.) Börner , Fl. Deut. Volk (1912) 713; ≡ Potamogeton pectinatus L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 127, as 'pectinatum' ; Mendoza & Del Rosario, Philipp. Aquat. Flow. Pl. Ferns (1967) 41; Type: from Europe.
